title: cassia rugosula
intro: Cassia rugosula, also known as the Senna plant, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family, native to tropical Africa and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly as a natural laxative due to the presence of anthraquinones, which stimulate bowel movements and relieve constipation. The health benefits of Cassia rugosula include treating digestive issues, such as irritable bowel syndrome and diarrhea, as well as aiding in weight loss and reducing inflammation. Cassia rugosula can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or powder, and is often used in traditional medicine practices, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential side effects.
